resolved.summary: Provider resolution forces local-subprocess; active backend never detected
resolved.verification_evidence:
resolveFreshSessionProviderName now auto-detects when provider is omitted or defaulted to local-subprocess, while explicit local-subprocess still wins.
Added provider auto-resolution coverage for omitted/defaulted active CLAUDECODE and OPENCODE sessions.
Verification: npm test -w auditor-lambda passed (538 tests).

resolved.summary: Canonical dispatch path never acquires live quota (central regression)
resolved.verification_evidence:
prepareDispatchArtifacts now accepts injected provider queryLimits, merges provider-reported limits ahead of cached discovered limits, builds a real-time quota source snapshot, and passes quotaSourceSnapshot into scheduleWave.
cmdPrepareDispatch and the semantic review dispatch path now construct the active provider/session config and pass queryLimits plus a best-effort hostModel into prepareDispatchArtifacts.
Verification: npm test -w auditor-lambda passed (538 tests).

resolved.summary: Add a cascading quota-signal fallback chain
resolved.verification_evidence:
Added shared buildQuotaSource factory to centralize quota snapshot cascade ordering, and replaced inline legacy quota-source construction with the shared factory.
resolveLimits now uses providerName for a provider_default fallback rung before the generic default.
Verification: npm test -w @audit-tools/shared passed (28 tests); npm test -w auditor-lambda passed (538 tests).
